scripts.dev:trigger: pnpm dlx trigger.dev@4.5.6 dev start --config apps/web/trigger.config.ts --env-file apps/web/.env.local
scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build crates/lens-wasm --target web --release --out-dir ../../apps/web/lib/wasm/lens --out-name lens_wasm && node scripts/prepare-wasm-package.mjs
